case_title: DIANE DORRANS SAEKS VS. HEIDI GERPHEIDE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GERPHEIDE, HEIDI

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SAEKS, DIANE DORRANS AS TO DEFENDANT GERPHEIDE, HEIDI CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY THE PARTIES, AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO CO-DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE, INC. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-09-2010 AT 3:30PM. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
